title: Expandable Retry Guide
prompt:
Create a production-ready Expandable Retry Guide using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Build a recovery notice that starts as a concise failed-upload message and expands into three specific, non-destructive retry checks. A warm amber marker distinguishes the notice without relying on color alone. Use a #F4F5F6 surrounding field, white Bento card, #ECECEE border, 22px radius, very soft neutral shadow, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F support copy. Amber is the only bright accent and the card cannot use a gradient.

Use a semantic disclosure button with aria-expanded and aria-controls, a 44px target, visible 3px dark focus ring, and a polite live region that announces whether guidance is shown. Click, Enter, and Space must all toggle the same state. Hover may lift the control 2px in 180ms and press can compress it 1px in 90ms. Expand the guide with a stiffness 320/damping 28 spring for height and a 180ms opacity transition for each check. Include a secondary Retry now button that changes the visible status to “Retry queued” without a timer, network request, or fake success.

At 320px, stack controls cleanly and retain readable labels; at wider sizes, let the card expand naturally without fixed positioning. Keep logical tab order, AA contrast, and native button semantics. Avoid remote media, browser storage, random values, dynamic code, and network calls. Respect prefers-reduced-motion by revealing the guidance immediately or with a 120ms opacity fade. Return complete TypeScript React client code and a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:
  • Keep this tab open.
*/ .uiwiki-retry-guide{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-left:4px solid #f59e0b;border-radius:22px;background:#fff;color:#111}.uiwiki-retry-guide button{min-height:44px;margin-top:12px;padding:0 12px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;font-weight:800}.uiwiki-retry-guide button:last-child{background:#111;color:#fff}.uiwiki-retry-guide ul{color:#4a4a4f}.uiwiki-retry-guide :focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-retry-guide *{transition:none!important}}
